events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Eighty-six years young! Ringo Starr, the man who kept the beat for the biggest band in history, celebrates a milestone today. What's your favourite Ringo moment or Beatles track featuring his unmistakable rhythm?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Rock & Science Icon
angles.copy: Happy 79th to the one and only Brian May! Guitar legend, astrophysicist, and all-round rock royalty. What's your top Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still commanding stages worldwide! Mick Jagger celebrates his birthday today. What's your favourite Rolling Stones track that gets you moving?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: MTV made its debut 45 years ago, forever changing the music landscape with its first video, The Buggles' "Video Killed The Radio Star".

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV burst onto screens, revolutionising how we consumed music. The first video? The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony is not lost on us.

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis's seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released 32 years ago on August 29, 1994, launching the band into superstardom.

angles.name: Definitely a Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music forever. What's your go-to track from that iconic debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival: 57 years on
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, opened its gates 57 years ago on August 15, 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. Which legendary performance from '69 still gives you chills?

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today, the world lost a legend. Remembering Elvis Presley, whose music continues to inspire generations. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: We remember the unparalleled guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who passed away 56 years ago on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Guitar God Tribute
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since we lost the incomparable Jimi Hendrix, a true innovator who redefined the electric guitar. His legacy lives on through every riff.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released 57 years ago on September 26, 1969, featuring some of their most beloved tracks.

angles.name: Crossing the Road to History
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road', an album as iconic as its zebra crossing cover. What's your standout track from their final recorded masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Seventy-five years young! Happy birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde, the powerhouse voice and songwriter behind The Pretenders. What's your favourite track from her incredible career?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad For It Birthday
angles.copy: Our kid turns 54! Happy birthday to Liam Gallagher, the unmistakable frontman who gave us some of the greatest anthems of the 90s. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem "Imagine" (from the album released October 1971) marks its 55th anniversary.

angles.name: Imagine 55 Years
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon released 'Imagine', a song that continues to resonate with its powerful message of peace and unity. A true musical masterpiece.

events.title: The first iPod turns 25
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the revolutionary first iPod 25 years ago this month, changing how we listen to music forever.

angles.name: 1000 Songs In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, the first iPod promised '1,000 songs in your pocket' and delivered a revolution. How did the iPod change your music listening habits?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating 64 years since the premiere of the very first 007 film, 'Dr. No'.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Sixty-four years since 007 first hit the big screen. What's your favourite Bond theme song or classic Bond moment?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we pay tribute to the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.
